remarks: Discover this stunning newly constructed 4 BR, 3.5-bath home in desirable North Stamford, offering modern elegance set on a beautifully private lot. The heart of the home is the gourmet kitchen featuring Thermador appliances, including a professional-grade gas range, along with a Bosch dishwasher. It boasts white shaker cabinetry, a striking marble tile backsplash, luxurious quartz countertops. The kitchen opens seamlessly into the family room with a cozy gas fireplace with white mantel and stone surround. Formal living room and convenient built-in cubbies in the mudroom. Sliding glass doors off the kitchen lead to a spacious deck overlooking the private backyard - an ideal setting for outdoor entertaining amid natural privacy. Upstairs, 4 generous bedrooms include a primary suite with walk-in closet and bath. One additional hall full bath. Second floor laundry plus an office. A standout feature is the large finished third-floor family room, perfect for a home theater, playroom or gym.  Additional highlights include a 2 car garage and a spacious unfinished walkout high ceiling basement with high ceilings. Throughout the home you'll enjoy light hardwood flooring, abundant natural light from oversized windows and the quality of true new construction. This move-in-ready residence is contemporary luxury.
